flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kaskaskia College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (10.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Kaskaskia College fell 32% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.5k → $3.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kaskaskia College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).
